description_long: This apartment building features a stepped, tiered design with four distinct levels, each receding as the structure rises. The exterior is finished in a light color with contrasting dark trim, and the building is surrounded by a flat, grassy base. Each floor has a spacious balcony with railings, providing outdoor space and visual interest. Large, vertically aligned windows are symmetrically distributed across all sides, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The main entrance is a single door located on the ground floor, and the roof is a simple, sloped design. The overall appearance is clean and geometric, with a modern yet classic urban residential feel.
description: A four-story, tiered apartment building with large balconies, symmetrical windows, and a single main entrance, finished in light and dark contrasting colors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, three large balconies, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the stepped terraces, main entrance door, and multiple windows on each floor.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tiered structure, tall windows, and absence of a visible entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with prominent vertical window alignment and the building's height emphasized.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are vertically aligned and symmetrically spaced across all floors, with consistent grouping on each level and larger windows on the lower floors.
